module.name: no-hardcoded-secrets
module.description: Disallow hardcoded secrets, credentials, tokens, and secret env defaults.

scenarios.name: should allow env reads and placeholder fixture values
scenarios.given: code that reads process.env without a literal fallback or uses dummy/test/example placeholders

scenarios.name: should report high-confidence credential formats
scenarios.given: code containing API key prefixes, JWT-shaped tokens, private keys, or credential URLs

scenarios.name: should report sensitive assignments and env defaults
scenarios.given: code assigning long literals to sensitive names or process.env fallbacks
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the literal context
scenarios.then: a hardcodedSecret violation is reported unless the file is an exempt test
